data.title: Add streaming response animation
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `ui/ux`

**Description:**
Improve the typing indicator and add smooth streaming animations for better UX.

**Proposed Solution:**
Enhanced streaming experience with visual feedback.

**Features:**

* Cursor/typing animation during streaming
* Smooth text appearance (typewriter effect optional)
* Token-by-token rendering
* Progress indicator for long responses
* Pulse animation on thinking indicator

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Visual feedback during AI response generation
- [ ] Smooth text rendering
- [ ] No flickering or layout jumps
- [ ] Works with both streaming and non-streaming modes
- [ ] Configurable animation speed

**Technical Considerations:**

* CSS animations for typing indicator
* Optimize DOM updates for smooth rendering
* Handle rapid token updates efficiently
* Test on mobile devices

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low** (CSS animations, DOM optimization)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low-Medium** (performance considerations, smooth rendering)
* 💎 Value: **Medium** (polish/UX improvement, makes app feel more responsive)
